items.name_en: Velvet🤩 Double Flap 2.55 Classic New Model《Burgundy Wine🍷》🚩🚩🚩OHANEL New CF Hidden Model🙈 Really beautiful at first glance, I just🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and durable💖 The special thing is that usually the shoulder strap is made of cowhide with a chain, this pairing of coffee leather with a chain shoulder strap is more high-end and retro, a fashionable item!

【New Coconut Tree Dark Blue❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. It holds daily essentials and features a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_en: Victoria Beckham style Chanel Black Ball Grain
items.name_cn:
Victoria Beckham style Chanel Black Ball Grain
 Discontinued Large Gold Clasp Bag❤️
In Stock. The Chanel Classic Flap Bag was reintroduced by Karl Lagerfeld in 1983 after taking over Chanel, and it is his most proud masterpiece. The large CF is very popular among celebrities and bloggers.
Its highlight is the large gold double C logo; current boutique versions no longer have this design, featuring only small double Cs. Victoria Beckham likes to shorten the chain and use it as a handbag.
It features a double-sided flap design with large capacity for a chain bag, lightweight, can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or as a handbag with a shortened chain.
Recommend buying the Victoria Beckham bag😘
Size 30.21.8cm
 Serial No. A2222

items.name_cn:
Vintage Distressed Finish
MIU New Arrival Academic Style Backpack: 5BZ043. Premium distressed lambskin paired with sturdy, wear-resistant linen-blend lining. This leather backpack features a campus-style design, blending exquisite craftsmanship with a casual attitude. Distinctive multi-pocket design highlights MIU's fashionable and playful spirit. Classic leather backpack strap and shoulder strap. A versatile styling essential: pairs with white T-shirt and jeans, khaki trench coat, casual sportswear... endless styles. Fits the universe inside: iPad, folding umbrella, makeup bag. Practical, lightweight, and full of sophistication.
Size: 22X18X11.5cm

items.name_cn:
Vintage Distressed Leather
5BB173: Miu New Size Long Handle Bowling Bag, made of ultra-soft vintage distressed lamb leather, paired with a chic accessory charm, bold innovative design perfectly interprets Miu's unconventional, free-spirited, and inclusive attitude towards life. This bag is cool, freezing a sophisticated multi-functional design, blending men's and women's elements, casual and lazy, natural and free, full of personality. It is an excellent choice for work commuting, shopping, and travel. It's popular online for a reason, loved by fashion bloggers and celebrities. Size: 28X12X8cm

items.name_cn: Vintage, stylish, and exquisite

specs.rawTitle: Vintage, stylish, and exquisite

items.name_cn:
VOLTAIRE Handbag and Crossbody
This name is derived from the French writer and philosopher Voltaire of the 18th century, who advocated freedom and advocated for a loose style. The entire bag is made of top-tier glossy box calf leather, making it soft and shiny, while amplifying the texture of the leather surface. The crescent bag shape is a very chic contemporary design, possessing many elements of the Bourgeoisie style of a fashion house, fully displaying an elegant charm and perfectly embellishing a city style!
Model: 787671
Size: 24×15×5cm
